mapper.select: SELECT e.equipment_id, e.equipment_name, e.equipment_status, ep.equipment_process_name, wd.employee_id AS manager_id, emp.employee_name AS manager_name, emp.employee_tier AS manager_tier FROM equipment e JOIN equipment_process ep ON e.equipment_process_id = ep.equipment_process_id LEFT JOIN worker_deployment wd ON e.equipment_id = wd.equipment_id AND wd.worker_deployment_role = 'PRIMARY' AND (wd.end_date IS NULL OR wd.end_date >= CURDATE()) LEFT JOIN employee emp ON wd.employee_id = emp.employee_id WHERE COALESCE(e.is_deleted, false) = false

SELECT ml.maintenance_log_id AS event_id, ml.maintenance_type AS event_type, CAST(CONCAT(ml.maintenance_date, ' 00:00:00') AS DATETIME) AS occurred_at, CONCAT( '점검결과 ', ml.maintenance_result, ' · 점수 ', COALESCE(CAST(ml.maintenance_score AS CHAR), '-'), ' · ETA Δ ', COALESCE(CAST(ml.eta_maint_delta AS CHAR), '-') ) AS description FROM maintenance_log ml WHERE ml.equipment_id = #{facilityId} ORDER BY ml.maintenance_date DESC, ml.created_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_name, wd.start_date FROM worker_deployment wd JOIN employee e ON wd.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE wd.equipment_id = #{facilityId} ORDER BY wd.start_date DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN equipment_status = 'OPERATING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS operating_count, SUM(CASE WHEN equipment_status = 'STOPPED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stopped_count, SUM(CASE WHEN equipment_status = 'UNDER_INSPECTION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS under_inspection_count, SUM(CASE WHEN equipment_status = 'DISPOSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS disposed_count FROM equipment WHERE COALESCE(is_deleted, false) = false
SELECT equipment_id, env_detected_at, env_temperature, env_humidity, env_particle_cnt, env_deviation_type FROM environment_event WHERE equipment_id = #{facilityId} ORDER BY env_detected_at DESC
